title: Status Effect Fix
description: An addition to Sheepearrr's Better Levels resource pack to make status effect levels higher than 9 show up in the inventory.
body:
## 📕 Status Effect Fix
This is the additional mod for my Better Levels resource pack! It makes it so you can see the level of every status effect in the inventory screen, not just up to level 9!

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/H2H118OP6T)

## Usage
You need the Better Levels resource pack for this to show up properly as I didn't embed it in this.

## Showcase
![A showcase of the mod with the Better Levels resource pack applied.](https://github.com/Sheepearrrrrrrrrr/Sheepearrrrrrrrrr.github.io/blob/main/about/effectfix.png?raw=true)
